sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ الشَّيْخُ أَطْفَالَ الْحَيِّ وَعَلَّمَهُمُ الدُّعَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Šejh je skupio djecu iz kvarta i naučio ih dovi.
sentences.translationEn: The Sheikh gathered the children of the neighborhood and taught them supplication.

sentences.translation: Naučio ih je jutarnjoj i večernjoj dovi.
sentences.translationEn: He taught them the morning supplication and the evening supplication.

sentences.arabic: رَدَّدَ الْأَطْفَالُ الدُّعَاءَ بِصَوْتٍ عَالٍ مَعَهُ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su glasno ponavljala dovu zajedno s njim.
sentences.translationEn: The children repeated the supplication aloud with him.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الشَّيْخُ: احْفَظُوهُمَا وَقُولُوهُمَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Šejh je rekao: Zapamtite ih i recite svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The Sheikh said: Memorize them and say them every day.
